description: Popup and sound alerts for Codex task completion, approvals, and user input requests.
command.testTask.title: Codex Alerts: Test Task Notification
command.testApproval.title: Codex Alerts: Test Approval Notification
command.testUserInput.title: Codex Alerts: Test User Input Notification
command.showDiagnostics.title: Codex Alerts: Show Diagnostics
command.restart.title: Codex Alerts: Restart Watchers
configuration.title: Codex Alerts
config.enableTaskCompleteAlerts.descript: Show a popup when Codex reports that a task has completed.
config.enableApprovalAlerts.description: Show a popup when Codex asks for elevated command approval.
config.enableUserInputAlerts.description: Show a popup when Codex asks for user input.
config.onlyNotifyWhenWindowInactive.desc: Only show Codex alerts when this VS Code window is not focused.
config.useWindowsMessageBox.description: Use a native Windows tray notification for Codex alerts so they appear near the taskbar instead of inside VS Code.
config.flashTaskbarOnAlert.description: Flash the VS Code taskbar button when a Codex alert arrives on Windows.
config.enableSound.description: Play a short sound with each Codex alert.
config.soundEffect.description: Choose which Windows sound effect to play for Codex alerts.
config.soundEffect.beep: Use the built-in console beep. Frequency and duration settings apply.
config.soundEffect.systemAsterisk: Play the Windows Asterisk system sound.
config.soundEffect.systemExclamation: Play the Windows Exclamation system sound.
config.soundEffect.systemHand: Play the Windows Hand system sound.
config.soundEffect.systemQuestion: Play the Windows Question system sound.
config.soundFrequencyHz.description: Sound frequency in Hz for the built-in beep. Only used when soundEffect is beep.
config.soundDurationMs.description: Sound duration in milliseconds for the built-in beep. Only used when soundEffect is beep.
config.pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for Codex state log queries.
config.pythonPath.description: Optional Python executable path used to read Codex's SQLite state database.
config.sqlite3Path.description: Optional sqlite3 executable path used if Python is unavailable.
config.debugLogging.description: Write verbose watcher diagnostics to the Codex Alerts output channel.
